Book.title: Book
Book.description: A book entry in the user's collection

seriesName.description: The name of the series the book belongs to

isRead.description: Whether the book has been read

page.description: The current page number (if not read)

coverUrl.description: The URL of the book cover image

addedAt.description: Timestamp when the book was added

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the book was last updated

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/books/.description: Collection of books for a specific user within an app artifact
